data.title: Kudelski SA Secures Strong Shareholder Support at 2025 AGM
data.description:
Kudelski SA ( (CH:KUD) ) has provided an announcement.

At the 2025 Annual General Meeting, Kudelski SA’s shareholders approved all Board proposals, including the re-election of board members and financial statements. This reinforces the company’s stable governance and strategic direction, maintaining its strong position in the digital security industry.

More about Kudelski SA

The Kudelski Group is a global leader in digital security technologies and solutions, focusing on media, cybersecurity, and IoT. Headquartered in Cheseaux-sur-Lausanne, Switzerland, and Phoenix, Arizona, USA, the company operates in over 20 countries worldwide.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $82.34M

data.title: GCL Global Holdings Launches ‘Mandragora: Whispers of the Witch Tree’
data.description:
GCL Global Holdings ( (GCL) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 17, 2025, GCL Global Holdings Ltd announced the launch of ‘Mandragora: Whispers of the Witch Tree,’ a dark fantasy RPG game developed by Primal Game Studio and published in Asia by Knights Peak Interactive. The game, which features over 40 hours of gameplay and deep character customization, is available on multiple platforms, including PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S. This launch marks a significant step for GCL in expanding its presence in the Asian gaming market, offering a genre-defining RPG experience that emphasizes narrative choices and immersive storytelling.

More about GCL Global Holdings

GCL Global Holdings Ltd is a leading provider of games and entertainment, focusing on immersive experiences that unite gaming communities worldwide. The company strategically targets the rapidly expanding Asian gaming market, leveraging a diverse portfolio of digital and physical content to introduce Asian-developed intellectual property to a global audience across various platforms.

YTD Price Performance: -82.91%

Average Trading Volume: 1,159,084

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $243.7M

data.title: Pacific Horizon Investment Trust PLC Acquires Own Shares
data.description:
Pacific Horizon Investment Trust PLC ( (GB:PHI) ) has issued an update.

Pacific Horizon Investment Trust PLC has announced the purchase of 150,000 of its own ordinary shares at a price of 542.93p each, which will be held in Treasury. This transaction adjusts the number of shares available for trading and may impact shareholder calculations under the FCA’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules.

data.title: Epwin Group Executes Share Repurchase and Cancels Shares
data.description:
Epwin Group plc ( (GB:EPWN) ) has shared an update.

Epwin Group Plc has executed a share repurchase of 20,000 ordinary shares at a price of 94.625 pence per share as part of its ongoing share repurchase programme. This transaction will result in the cancellation of the repurchased shares, reducing the company’s total issued share capital to 136,108,395 ordinary shares, which may impact shareholder voting rights and interest notifications under regulatory guidelines.

More about Epwin Group plc

Epwin Group Plc is a leading manufacturer of energy-efficient and low-maintenance building products, with significant market shares in the Repair, Maintenance and Improvement (RMI), new build, and social housing sectors. The company is based in the United Kingdom.

data.title: Q & M Dental Group Seeks Secondary Listing on Bursa Malaysia
data.description:
The latest update is out from Q & M Dental Group (Singapore) Limited ( (SG:QC7) ).

Q & M Dental Group (Singapore) Limited has announced its intention to seek a secondary listing on the Main Market of Bursa Malaysia Securities Berhad. This strategic move is aimed at broadening the company’s investor base, increasing share liquidity, and providing additional platforms for future fundraising. The company has appointed professional advisers to assist with the application process and ensure compliance with relevant regulations. As of now, no application has been submitted to the Securities Commission Malaysia.

More about Q & M Dental Group (Singapore) Limited

Q & M Dental Group (Singapore) Limited operates in the healthcare industry, primarily focusing on providing dental services. The company is based in Singapore and aims to expand its market reach and investor base.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Visionstate Corp. Expands Market Reach with New Technology Launches
data.description:
An update from Visionstate ( (TSE:VIS) ) is now available.

Visionstate Corp. has announced a robust sales pipeline and new technology launches aimed at expanding its market reach. The company is experiencing increased demand for its Wanda platform, an IoT-based solution for tracking cleaning and maintenance in public facilities. Visionstate has introduced WandaLITE, a streamlined version of Wanda, and MIRA, a new application for digital inspections, both of which will be showcased at an upcoming conference. The company is also advancing its proprietary AI model to optimize staff scheduling and routing, positioning itself for growth across North America.

Through its subsidiary, Visionstate IoT Inc., the company provides innovative facility management solutions, shaping the future of smart buildings and public infrastructure.

data.title: EMGS Reports Increased Vessel Utilization and Multi-Client Sales for Q1 2025
data.description:
ElectroMagnetic GeoServices ASA ( (DE:E2M) ) has provided an announcement.

Electromagnetic Geoservices ASA (EMGS) reported a vessel utilization rate of 35% for the first quarter of 2025, an increase from 27% in the same period of 2024, with the Atlantic Guardian vessel completing and initiating proprietary surveys in India. The company anticipates approximately USD 150 thousand in multi-client late sales for the quarter, with financial results to be published on May 14, 2025.

More about ElectroMagnetic GeoServices ASA

EMGS, a leader in the marine electromagnetic (EM) market, provides technology to assist oil and gas companies in offshore hydrocarbon exploration. Their services encompass survey design, data acquisition, processing, and interpretation, integrating EM data with seismic and other geophysical information to enhance exploration efficiency and reduce risks. The company is also exploring the use of its technology for detecting marine mineral deposits and estimating their mineral content.

YTD Price Performance: 5.71%

Average Trading Volume: 170

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: GSK’s Blenrep Combinations Approved in UK for Multiple Myeloma
data.description:
GlaxoSmithKline ( (GB:GSK) ) has provided an announcement.

GSK has announced the UK MHRA’s approval of Blenrep combinations for treating relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma, marking the first global authorization in this setting. The approval is based on superior efficacy results from the DREAMM-7 and DREAMM-8 phase III trials, which demonstrated significant improvements in progression-free and overall survival compared to standard treatments. This development positions Blenrep as a potentially transformative therapy in the treatment landscape, offering a differentiated mechanism of action and addressing the urgent need for more effective multiple myeloma treatments.

Spark’s Take on GB:GSK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:GSK is a Outperform.

GlaxoSmithKline’s overall stock score reflects a stable financial performance with notable strengths in specialty medicines growth and shareholder return strategies. The company’s fair valuation and strong dividend yield support its attractiveness as an investment. However, technical indicators suggest caution, and challenges such as managing leverage and legal costs present risks. The positive earnings call and strategic corporate events further bolster the outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:GSK stock, click here.

More about GlaxoSmithKline

GlaxoSmithKline (GSK) is a global healthcare company operating in the pharmaceutical industry, primarily focusing on the development and production of vaccines, medicines, and consumer healthcare products. The company is known for its innovative treatments and has a significant market presence in oncology, respiratory, and HIV therapies.
